statement: In every magma, Equation 1766 (`x = (y * z) * ((x * z) * w)`) implies Equation 317 (`x * x = y * (y * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0941
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op x z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op y z))
